tasks.label: k3s: First-time setup (Exoscale)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -e ACTION=setup -e PROVIDER=exoscale -e EXOSCALE_ZONE -e EXOSCALE_API_KEY -e EXOSCALE_API_SECRET sinanozel/k3s-anywhere:latest

tasks.label: k3s: First-time setup (AWS)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -e ACTION=setup -e PROVIDER=aws -e AWS_REGION -v ${env:HOME}/.aws:/root/.aws:ro sinanozel/k3s-anywhere:latest

tasks.label: k3s: Provision (Exoscale)
tasks.command: mkdir -p output && docker run --rm --env-file configs/example.env --env-file .env.secrets -e ACTION=provision -e PROVIDER=exoscale -v ${workspaceFolder}/output:/app/output sinanozel/k3s-anywhere:latest

tasks.label: k3s: Provision (AWS)
tasks.command: mkdir -p output && docker run --rm --env-file configs/example.env --env-file .env.secrets -e ACTION=provision -e PROVIDER=aws -v ${workspaceFolder}/output:/app/output sinanozel/k3s-anywhere:latest

tasks.label: k3s: Teardown (Exoscale)
tasks.command: docker run --rm --env-file configs/example.env --env-file .env.secrets -e ACTION=teardown -e PROVIDER=exoscale -v ${workspaceFolder}/output:/app/output sinanozel/k3s-anywhere:latest

tasks.label: k3s: Teardown (AWS)
tasks.command: docker run --rm --env-file configs/example.env --env-file .env.secrets -e ACTION=teardown -e PROVIDER=aws -v ${workspaceFolder}/output:/app/output sinanozel/k3s-anywhere:latest

tasks.label: k3s: Check status (Exoscale)
tasks.command: docker run --rm --env-file configs/example.env --env-file .env.secrets -e ACTION=check -e PROVIDER=exoscale -v ${workspaceFolder}/output:/app/output sinanozel/k3s-anywhere:latest

tasks.label: k3s: Check status (AWS)
tasks.command: docker run --rm --env-file configs/example.env --env-file .env.secrets -e ACTION=check -e PROVIDER=aws -v ${workspaceFolder}/output:/app/output sinanozel/k3s-anywhere:latest

tasks.label: k3s: Get kubeconfig
tasks.command: CLUSTER_NAME=$(grep '^CLUSTER_NAME=' configs/example.env | cut -d= -f2) && jq -r '.kubeconfig' output/${CLUSTER_NAME}.json > ~/.kube/${CLUSTER_NAME}.yaml && echo "Kubeconfig written to ~/.kube/${CLUSTER_NAME}.yaml"
